canonical_name: Internal-only Linear A slot classifier (Task A)
research_question: Can each distinct Linear A word-form be assigned a document-role / semantic slot (TOPONYM_LIKE, COMMODITY, TRANSACTION_TERM, RITUAL_FORMULA, PERSON_NAME_LIKE, ...) using ONLY evidence internal to the LA corpus, frozen before any external anchor touches LA?
method_family: deterministic rule-based tiered classifier (recurrence/position/genre features; stdlib-only)
mechanical_verdict: Frozen manifest of 1165 candidates; 11 tier-B TOPONYM_LIKE = the E3 target set. Deterministic-regeneration hash MATCH.
data_sources_corpus_version: corpus/silver inscriptions_structured.json (sha aaee1aeb...), signs_ontology.json (sha 246f63f1...); licensed silver, read-only, referenced in place
source_dependencies: LA silver corpus only; ontology used for sign CLASS (logogram/syllabogram) never phonetic value
effective_n_independence_unit: 1165 distinct word-forms (unit = unique form); 11 tier-B TOPONYM_LIKE, 44 incl tier-C, 27 COMMODITY(A), 3 TRANSACTION_TERM(A), 359 PERSON_NAME_LIKE(C), 243 RITUAL_FORMULA, 485 UNKNOWN, 370 tier-X excluded
features_channels: occ/n_sites/n_docs recurrence, sign length, damage flag, header_rate/terminal_rate/pre_num_rate/post_logo position, adj_kuro/adj_kiro, ritual_genre_rate, support genre. NO phonetic feature
algorithm_model: tiered deterministic rules (X exclude, TRANSACTION_TERM, COMMODITY, RITUAL_FORMULA, entry-leading TOPONYM/PERSON, UNKNOWN); tiers A/B/C/X
search_space_params: no search; fixed rule thresholds (ritual_genre_rate>=0.5, header/pre_num>=0.5, n_sites>=2 OR n_docs>=3); split seed 20260706
segmentation: uses corpus word-form segmentation; per-sign alternative transcriptions NOT propagated (alternative_transcriptions=[])
preregistration_plan_hash: rule version slot-rules-v1-2026-07-06; manifest gold sha256 dc9653a91d7ba14dcb762389... in data/manifests/slot_candidate_manifest.sha256
heldout_design: leave-one-site-out (heldout_group=primary site), seed 20260706, recorded in manifest checksum
positive_negative_controls: 11/11 leakage tests (stdlib-only imports; opens only 2 pinned corpus files; refuses to run if a matcher module exists)
primary_metric_value: counts by class x tier (see effective_n); reproducibility hash dc9653a9...5d024551 MATCH
uncertainty: TOPONYM_LIKE vs PERSON_NAME_LIKE is a recurrence heuristic not a proof; tier-B/C and site/doc thresholds are sensitivity levers; TITLE_OR_OFFICE/INSTITUTION intentionally empty
ablations_robustness: tier-B vs tier-B+C target sets flagged for sensitivity; transcription-variant re-run required downstream
contamination_leakage: leakage-proven internal_only_clean; manifest built provably before any matcher exists
licence_earned: none (STRUCTURAL scaffold only; no transfer licence)
strongest_authorized_claim: An internal-only, frozen, reproducible slot manifest exists supplying 11 tier-B toponym-like confirmatory targets
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any TOPONYM_LIKE form IS a toponym or has any phonetic/lexical value
limitations_blockers: per-sign transcription uncertainty not propagated; slot classes are heuristics
supersession_relations: the SAME frozen classifier is inherited UNMODIFIED by la_lb_continuity (packet A) and la_lb_ritual (RITUAL_FORMULA class)
verdict_ledger_reference: manifest sha in slot_candidate_manifest.sha256 (gold data gitignored/licensed-derived)
record_confidence: HIGH; counts REPORT_ONLY (gold jsonl gitignored) but reproducibility hash VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT

canonical_name: Toponym-anchor power envelope pilot (Task D / E1)
research_question: At Linear-A scarcity (~3-4 secure Egyptian toponyms, ~11 candidates), can a fuzzy-match-under-mapping-search procedure separate genuine toponym anchoring from chance (end-to-end FP vs recovery)?
method_family: abstract Monte-Carlo power simulation (synthetic anchors/candidates; no real anchor-LA matching)
mechanical_verdict: Design-level null (provisional): in-sample best-of-search FP~0.72-1.00 = uninformative; held-out FP~0.22-0.30 with recovery only ~0.35-0.45 -> under-powered as naively scoped
data_sources_corpus_version: synthetic only; n_cand=11 taken from Task-A tier-B count; no real corpus values
source_dependencies: n_cand=11 from Task-A manifest; all distortion parameters PROVISIONAL pending REQ-02 Hoch/Kilani calibration
effective_n_independence_unit: n_anchors grid 2-6; 300 trials/cell; n_cand=11, V=20
features_channels: abstract sound-slot skeletons (length 3), Hamming tolerance 1
algorithm_model: random per-sign mapping search, flexibility 3, budget 300; graduate = >=75% anchors matched by one mapping
search_space_params: mapping flexibility 3, Hamming tol 1, budget 300, La=3, V=20, graduation 75%
preregistration_plan_hash: NOT_PREREGISTERED (exploratory pilot); manifest reproducibility PASS (dc9653a9...) for the input count
heldout_design: in-sample vs held-out anchor evaluation both simulated
positive_negative_controls: the frozen-mapping branch is the intended constraint; not yet exercised with real params
null_family_run_count: Monte-Carlo 300 trials/cell x 5 anchor counts; null = the same procedure on synthetic
multiplicity_correction: mapping search IS the multiplicity being measured (in-sample FP~1.0 demonstrates the trap)
uncertainty: all params PROVISIONAL; signal-to-null gap only ~0.15; abstract not calibrated
power: leans NO_POWER for the naive design; the two levers = a FROZEN correspondence model (no search) + longer real skeletons + fewer higher-confidence candidates
ablations_robustness: frozen branch vs search branch; re-run required with calibrated Hoch/Kilani model + real skeleton lengths + tier-B vs tier-B+C
contamination_leakage: N/A synthetic; the point is to prevent leakage via a frozen model downstream
strongest_authorized_claim: Do NOT run a confirmatory toponym match expecting a positive result until the design is constrained (frozen model + held-out only)
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any toponym anchor has been recovered or that the channel is dead
limitations_blockers: must be re-run under the frozen empirical Egyptian correspondence model (not yet fit) before any go/no-go
supersession_relations: provisional NO_POWER stands only for the naive synthetic model; empirical-model verdict pending EA-03/EA-12 fit; motivated the toponym-channel redirect to la_lb_continuity
verdict_ledger_reference: no committed result JSON; envelope table in TOPONYM_POWER_ENVELOPE.md
record_confidence: HIGH on design intent; envelope numbers REPORT_ONLY (no committed result file), explicitly PROVISIONAL

canonical_name: Frozen Egyptian->foreign correspondence (group-writing->sound) distortion model (Task C)
research_question: Estimate on an INDEPENDENT non-Cretan calibration corpus (and freeze before matching) the Egyptian group-writing->sound / foreign-approximation distortion, removing the mapping search that drives false positives.
method_family: phonological correspondence model fit on independent calibration data (design)
mechanical_verdict: Model NOT fit; calibration source blocker (Hoch PDF OCR-corrupted) found then LIFTED (Kilani 2019 CC-BY clean); fit still not executed this pass
data_sources_corpus_version: Hoch 1994 (594pp, sha 4df9bc09; OCR-corrupted, not fittable); Kilani 2019 Vocalisation in Group Writing (CC-BY, clean, 161pp); TLA Late Egyptian v19 (CC-BY-SA, not fetched); Muchiki 1999 (paywalled, optional)
source_dependencies: critical path dependency for RQ2/RQ3, EA-04 positive control, EA-05 null families, EA-02 recalibration
effective_n_independence_unit: non-Cretan calibration records only; primary set requires >=~150 clean entries to avoid degenerate fit
features_channels: consonant substitution/omission/merger, vowel-indicator reliability, group-writing boundaries
algorithm_model: item_class-stratified correspondence model, frozen before touching Cretan targets
search_space_params: eligibility thresholds frozen-in-principle (source-form conf>=0.7 primary, egyptian-reading conf>=0.7 primary; disputed/intermediary -> sensitivity/excluded)
segmentation: segment-level Egyptian-group <-> Semitic-consonant alignment (blocked by OCR in Hoch)
candidate_languages_hypotheses: calibrated on Semitic/foreign names (NON-Cretan) as the independent distortion prior
preregistration_plan_hash: inclusion rules frozen-in-principle (EGYPTIAN_CALIBRATION_INCLUSION_RULES.md); PRIMARY manifest to be checksum-pinned before fit (not populated)
heldout_design: model frozen on independent corpus, applied identically to real and null anchors
positive_negative_controls: Cretan/Keftiu/LA records excluded by construction (structurally impossible leakage), verified by an exclusion test when populated
multiplicity_correction: freezing removes the mapping search = the dominant FP driver (the whole point)
uncertainty: Kilani calibrates group-writing->sound from NATIVE Egyptian (via Coptic); the foreign-consonant-approximation layer remains a documented approximation until Muchiki lands
ablations_robustness: PRIMARY vs sensitivity tier inclusion prespecified
contamination_leakage: corpus construction excludes every Cretan/Keftiu/LA record by rule
strongest_authorized_claim: Calibration is no longer data-blocked (open Kilani source in hand); model fit remains the pacing item
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any Egyptian->LA correspondence has been established
limitations_blockers: model not yet fit; REQ-02b/REQ-02c open; without the frozen model EA-02/EA-04/EA-06 cannot proceed to standard
supersession_relations: supersedes the Hoch-OCR blocker for the sign->sound layer (Kilani); gates EA-02 recalibration, EA-04, EA-06
verdict_ledger_reference: no result; status INCOMPLETE per STATUS.md calibration gate
record_confidence: HIGH that it is designed-not-run; source-blocker lift VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT (audit report)

canonical_name: Linear-B matched-scarcity positive control (Task B / E2)
research_question: Can the SAME pipeline recover a known LB->Greek toponym/name relationship when degraded to Linear-A scarcity? If not, the LA test has no interpretive value (sensitivity gate).
method_family: positive-control degradation harness (deciphered comparator degraded to target scale)
mechanical_verdict: Protocol + module design + provisional degradation scaffold + 3 tests; NOT executed; no sensitivity claimed

source_dependencies: shares src/nulls/nulllib.py; degradation layer PROVISIONAL until EA-03 frozen Hoch/Kilani model replaces it
effective_n_independence_unit: anchor grid 2-6 (matched to EA-02); LOSO split
features_channels: matched: sign inventory, token count, admin genre, word-length dist, projected-value uncertainty, transcription uncertainty, external-representation distortion
algorithm_model: degrade(skeleton,params,rng) vowel-loss/merger/epenthesis/omission/substitution/noise; harness runs held-out recover-vs-null; fixed params never tuned to maximize recovery
search_space_params: anchor grid 2-6; same optimization budget/restart as LA; success threshold provisional (held-out recovery materially exceeds null under frozen mapping)
segmentation: segmentation ambiguity matched to LA setup
candidate_languages_hypotheses: Greek (known ground-truth referents), recovered without being told the mapping
heldout_design: mapping learned on training anchors must predict held-out-anchor Greek values
positive_negative_controls: this IS the positive control; corrupted-relation variant = null family 8 in EA-05
null_family_run_count: shares EA-05 null families; not run
multiplicity_correction: same end-to-end null path as LA
uncertainty: distortion + mapping-flexibility PROVISIONAL until frozen model
power: gate: if pipeline cannot recover LB->Greek at matched scarcity -> LA test NO_POWER/method-rejected
contamination_leakage: harness refuses to score without a receipt and a held-out split (tested)
strongest_authorized_claim: The sensitivity gate is designed; no sensitivity is claimed until run under the frozen model
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the pipeline has demonstrated sensitivity
limitations_blockers: not executed; blocked on EA-03 frozen model
supersession_relations: gates EA-06 (E3) go/no-go; provisional degradation replaced by EA-03 once fit

mechanical_verdict: 5 pairs (incl PA-I-TO admin comparison): SE-TO-I-JA 0 edits, PA-I-TO 0 edits, TU-RU-SA/I-DA/DI-KI-TA 2 edits each; 2/5 exact, 3/5 require 2 edits; all CONFIRMATORY_INELIGIBLE/posthoc HIGH
data_sources_corpus_version: public LA<->LB continuities + LB scholarship; ledger known_ritual_pair_ledger.jsonl
source_dependencies: public literature; not from packet A/B
effective_n_independence_unit: 5 quarantined pairs
features_channels: LA context, LB form, number_of_edit_operations, drift flag
algorithm_model: edit-distance computed ONLY on quarantined public pairs (not a candidate<->target matcher)
heldout_design: quarantined from both packets and the drift model
positive_negative_controls: the 3 drifting pairs are exactly what a drift model must NOT be trained on (§VIII)
uncertainty: all known continuities are TOPONYMS whose LB form is administrative -> no in-domain ritual exemplar
power: removes the only exact drift exemplars from the evaluable set
contamination_leakage: never touches packet A or B; edit-distance only fills a required field
strongest_authorized_claim: The known continuities are quarantined toponyms; there is no known LA-ritual<->LB-religious exemplar
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any known pair is genuine or usable as confirmation
limitations_blockers: no in-domain exemplar is a headline NO_POWER trigger
supersession_relations: reuses LC-03 discipline; feeds LR-04 drift audit + LR-08 verdict

canonical_name: Independent drift-model feasibility audit (D0-D4; D3 admissibility)
research_question: Can a drift-tolerant edit model (spanning the vowel-quality substitutions the known pairs need) be specified WITHOUT learning transformations from the quarantined known pairs?
mechanical_verdict: D3 (independent constrained edit, >=2 subs) NOT admissible: transformations_estimated_from_independent_data=false, weights_cross_validated=false, target_pairs_absent_from_training=false; drift_model_feasible=false. Only D0/D1 (exact/tier-A) + D2 (<=1 flagged) admissible, spanning 0 genuine drift
data_sources_corpus_version: observed drift operations from quarantined pairs (feasibility only); independent sources checked
source_dependencies: LR-03 ledger (observed, not fit); LB morphology; palaeographic A<->B equivalence
effective_n_independence_unit: 3 drift operation types audited
features_channels: vowel u->i (WEAK), vowel a->o (WEAK), derivational suffix +i-jo/+de (MODERATE)
algorithm_model: 5 model families D0-D4; D3 admissibility = 7 criteria all-must-hold
search_space_params: D0 span 0, D1 span 0, D2 <=1 flagged, D3 >=2 subs (inadmissible), D4 unbounded (FP stress test only)
heldout_design: target pairs would have to be absent from training (they are not) -> circular
positive_negative_controls: the clear vowel-drift examples ARE the quarantined known pairs -> circular if used
null_family_run_count: no admissible independent-drift null (family 9 = N/A in LR-07)
multiplicity_correction: permitting free affixation/edits inflates false positives
primary_metric_value: D3_admissible=false; blocking criteria = 3 (independent estimation, cross-validation, target absence); feasible families D0/D1/D2
uncertainty: vowel-quality substitutions have only WEAK independent support; suffixes MODERATE but length-changing
power: admissible models span 0 genuine drift -> drift-inclusive phenomenon untestable
ablations_robustness: independent sources (LB spelling variation, scribal variants, morphology, allographs) all checked; none grounds the drift
contamination_leakage: drift feasibility does not import/fit the candidate/target packets (observes only)
strongest_authorized_claim: A constrained drift model is NOT independently specifiable; the ritual channel (like the administrative) can test only exact/near-exact continuity
forbidden_stronger_claim: That a drift-tolerant ritual test is feasible
limitations_blockers: genuine sound-change drift cannot be grounded without reusing the quarantined pairs
supersession_relations: the D_drift=NO_POWER driver for LR-08; mirrors LC-10 drift NO_POWER
record_confidence: HIGH; drift_feasibility.json VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT (read on disk), file untracked/uncommitted

canonical_name: Ritual leakage firewall proven before any matching interface (§XI)
research_question: Is the firewall between packet A, packet B, and the known-pair ledger provably in place BEFORE any matching code exists?
mechanical_verdict: 7/7 (report lists 8 guarantees) pass: LA builder cannot read LB, LB cannot read LA, neither reads the ledger, drift feasibility does not fit packets, packet A has no LB/phonetic, packet B has no LA, no side-by-side inventory, no similarity function on real inventories
data_sources_corpus_version: source-level checks on builders + sim
effective_n_independence_unit: 7-8 firewall guarantees
features_channels: import/source checks
algorithm_model: static source inspection + tests
heldout_design: firewall exists before any matching interface
positive_negative_controls: sim uses synthetic/within-script only; no admin real matcher imported
uncertainty: none material
ablations_robustness: LA quarantine uses a hardcoded known-forms set (one-directional), not the ledger file
contamination_leakage: no real LA<->LB ritual matching/similarity/score computed anywhere in this pass
strongest_authorized_claim: The feasibility pass is provably firewalled; no real matching occurred
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any matching result exists
limitations_blockers: the quarantined public known-pair ledger is the only permitted side-by-side
supersession_relations: certifies LR-07/LR-08 as leakage-clean; parallels EA-01/LC leakage tests

canonical_name: Ritual feasibility positive controls PC-R1..R4 (synthetic/within-script)
research_question: Would a ritual matching pipeline (if built) be alive and specific for exact/near-exact continuity at the real ritual scarcity (feasibility, on synthetic/within-script data only)?
mechanical_verdict: PC-R1 exact synthetic implant recovered 1/1..5/5; PC-R2 degraded recovered only by D2 (D0 exact=0); PC-R3 LB-internal 15/15 self-persistence, 0 cross-term FP; PC-R4 known-pair representation 2 exact / 3 drift (POSTHOC_FACE_VALIDITY_ONLY, sets no threshold)
data_sources_corpus_version: synthetic + within-script (no real LA<->LB matching)
effective_n_independence_unit: implant grid 1,2,3,5; LB-internal n=15
features_channels: exact synthetic implant; single-flagged-position degradation (D2)
algorithm_model: within-script recovery simulation (no real cross-script match)
heldout_design: feasibility controls before any real matching
positive_negative_controls: PC-R3 cross-term FP = 0 (specificity)
primary_metric_value: PC-R1 100% exact recovery; PC-R3 15/15 recovery, 0 cross-FP; PC-R4 2 exact / 3 drift
uncertainty: PC-R4 sets no threshold and no readiness weight (posthoc face-validity only)
power: confirms exact-continuity recoverable in principle; drift not (D3 inadmissible)
ablations_robustness: D0 exact vs D2 flagged tolerance behave as specified
contamination_leakage: synthetic/within-script only; no real inventories matched
strongest_authorized_claim: A ritual pipeline would be sensitive/specific for EXACT continuity at the real scarcity (feasibility)
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any real ritual continuity was detected
limitations_blockers: controls do not rescue drift (no admissible D3)
supersession_relations: parallels LC-07; feeds LR-08 exact-feasibility split

canonical_name: Ritual null families + power simulation (12 families, permissive-drift FP)
research_question: What are the end-to-end false-positive rates (exact vs permissive-drift) and the power for a hypothetical ritual-continuity test, including the post-hoc channel-selection penalty (synthetic/within-script only)?
method_family: end-to-end null battery + power envelope (feasibility simulation)
mechanical_verdict: Exact: FP 0.8% (1.6% post-hoc-bounded), full power min-detectable 1. Permissive-drift (D4): FP 99.62% (13.08 spurious matches/run), combined best-of-search FP 99.63% -> undetectable. Family 9 (independent-drift null) N/A (D3 inadmissible). P(NO_POWER) realistic ~0.60
data_sources_corpus_version: synthetic/permuted + within-script; 9 PRIMARY / 15 EVAL scarcity
effective_n_independence_unit: 12 null families; 9 independent PRIMARY (7 cross-site) / 15 EVAL
features_channels: nulls preserve freq/length/cluster/site/object-class structure
algorithm_model: 12 families incl random pairing, freq-matched synth, len-matched synth, cluster/site/object shuffles (degenerate), matched non-ritual controls, perturbed equivalence, independent-drift null (N/A), permissive best-of-edit, known-pair penalty, post-hoc selection penalty
search_space_params: permissive D4 edit = unbounded (FP stress test); post-hoc bound doubles nominal FP (2 channels tried)
segmentation: min useful length >=3 (2-sign forms dominate chance collision under tolerance)
heldout_design: detection rule >=1 exact recovered (null 95th pct ~0)
positive_negative_controls: matched non-ritual controls FP 0.97%; degenerate shuffles = 0
null_family_run_count: 12 families; family 9 (independent drift) has no admissible model
multiplicity_correction: post-hoc-bounded FP 1.6% (0.8% x2 channels); permissive combined 99.63%
primary_metric_value: permissive FP 0.9962 / 13.076 mean; exact FP 0.008; combined best-of-search 0.9963; post-hoc-bounded 0.016
uncertainty: the edit tolerance required to span drift is completely uncalibrated
power: exact FULL (min 1); drift undetectable (no admissible model); P(NO_POWER)~0.60
ablations_robustness: formulaic clustering reduces effective units below 9; known-pair quarantine removes exact drift exemplars
contamination_leakage: synthetic/within-script; no real matching
strongest_authorized_claim: Exact ritual continuity is mechanically testable with good specificity, but drift needs an uncalibrated edit tolerance with FP~1 -> NO_POWER for the realistic phenomenon
forbidden_stronger_claim: That any real ritual continuity signal exists
limitations_blockers: no admissible independent drift model; no in-domain exemplar
supersession_relations: quantitative basis for LR-08 verdict; mirrors LC-08/LC-10

canonical_name: Final ritual feasibility verdict (§XII)
research_question: Is a future falsifiable LA<->LB ritual-continuity test justified (feasibility + power), or should the ritual channel be stopped?
mechanical_verdict: status=COMPLETE, ritual_channel_readiness=NO_POWER. Triggers: (1) drift model not independently specifiable (D3 inadmissible); (2) permissive-drift FP ~99.6%; (3) no in-domain known exemplar. Split: EXACT ritual mechanically possible but no exemplar + likely domain mismatch; DRIFT = NO_POWER. Recommendation: STOP; return to the preserved Egyptian channel
data_sources_corpus_version: all ritual result files (drift_feasibility, ritual_controls, ritual_nulls_power)
effective_n_independence_unit: 9 PRIMARY / 15 EVAL; untouched 9x15 set
features_channels: verdict = deterministic function of feasibility criteria
algorithm_model: src/sim/ritual_verdict.py (model does not decide)
heldout_design: untouched evaluation route exists (9x15) but tests only EXACT
positive_negative_controls: exact controls recoverable; exact FP acceptable
uncertainty: LA-libation vs LB-religious domains may not overlap
ablations_robustness: criteria dict all recorded in ritual_final_verdict.json
contamination_leakage: feasibility construction low-circularity; no real matching
strongest_authorized_claim: STOP the ritual channel as NO_POWER; the LA<->LB continuity question is exhausted (both admin + ritual) within no-free-mapping / no-circular-drift
forbidden_stronger_claim: Requesting a ritual input-freeze or running real matching; any decipherment claim
limitations_blockers: no admissible drift model; no in-domain exemplar
supersession_relations: closes the LA<->LB lineage; hands off to the preserved Egyptian channel (EA campaign)
